calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing Of The Estate.
Off Calendar Mar-14-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-04-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-28-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated January 24, 2006 and Codicil dated January 26, 2021 are admitted to probate. Joseph L. Alioto, II and Lawrence E. Alioto, Jr. are appointed Executors of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 04, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Robert Woods; Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher. Not Reported. (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-05-2021 Continued To Apr-28-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
